\tzpentry{ID5886}{Volume Complete Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5886 introduces Volume Complete Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$W = \frac{1}{2\pi i} \oint_C \frac{d(\text{Det}[J])}{{\rm Det}[J]} \neq 0$$
